documents.name: fnol.txt
documents.text: Policyholder Sam Carter reports a collision on 2026-05-14 at Elm St & 2nd Ave, Oakland, CA. Insured states 'the car in front stopped at the light and I couldn't stop in time and hit the back of it.' Insured vehicle drivable but front-end damage; insured reported no injuries. Other driver identified as Dana Lee.

documents.name: police_report.pdf
documents.text: Officer narrative: Vehicle 1 (Carter) struck Vehicle 2 (Lee) from behind while Vehicle 2 (Lee) was stopped at a steady red signal. Carter cited under CVC 21703 for following too closely. No citation issued to Lee. Roadway was wet.

documents.name: edr_readout.pdf
documents.text: Carter vehicle EDR, 5 seconds pre-impact: speed 30 mph; no brake application until 0.3 seconds before impact; steady throttle prior to braking.

documents.name: weather_report.pdf
documents.text: NOAA station record for the area at the time of collision: light rain, roadway wet, visibility reduced.

documents.name: repair_invoice.pdf
documents.text: Certified body shop estimate for Carter vehicle front-end repair: $18,000. No medical billing submitted. Total documented damages: $18,000.
